$schema.title: Config Schema URL
$schema.description: The Schema URL, which should be `https://weme-ui.github.io/schema/v2/config.schema.json`

components.title: Components Path
components.description: The path of the components directory.

composables.title: Composables Path
composables.description: The path of the composables directory.

layouts.title: Layouts Path
layouts.description: The path of the layouts directory.

pages.title: Pages Path
pages.description: The path of the pages directory.

plugins.title: Plugins Path
plugins.description: The path of the plugins directory.

themes.title: Themes Path
themes.description: The path of the themes directory.

types.title: Types Path
types.description: The path of the types directory.

utils.title: Utils Path
utils.description: The path of the utils directory.

paths.title: Config Paths
paths.description: The paths used in the project config.

registries.title: Config Registries
registries.description: The registries used in the project.

name.title: Registry Name
name.description: The name of the registry, in the format of `repo/registry`.

prefix.title: Registry Prefix
prefix.description: The prefix of the components from this registry.

default.title: Default Registry
default.description: Whether this registry is the default registry, which will be used when the registry is not specified in the component usage.

items.title: Config Registry
items.description: A registry used in the project config.

title: Weme UI Project Config JSON Schema Definitions
description: This schema defines the structure of the project config JSON file used in Weme UI.
